title: Checking Into a Hotel
description: Practice checking in at a hotel front desk, confirming your reservation, and asking about amenities or checkout time.
context: You have arrived at a hotel in the evening with a reservation. The front desk clerk will ask for your name and ID, then help you get your room key.
opening_line: Good evening! Welcome to the Riverside Hotel. Do you have a reservation with us?
goal_state: user has confirmed they have a reservation
user has provided their name when asked
user has asked at least one question about the stay, room, or hotel amenities
user has confirmed checkout time or key details before leaving the desk
success_criteria: User successfully completes a hotel check-in interaction
